## 2. 技术栈

**语言:** Python

**主要依赖:**
- agentscope==1.0.16.dev0
- agentscope-runtime==1.1.0
- discord-py>=2.3
- dingtalk-stream>=0.24.3
- uvicorn>=0.40.0
- apscheduler>=3.11.2,<4
- playwright>=1.49.0
- questionary>=2.1.1
- mss>=9.0.0
- reme-ai==0.3.0.0

## 3. 项目结构

```
./website/vite.config.ts
./setup.py
./console/eslint.config.js
./console/vite.config.ts
./console/main.py

```
